description_long: This kiosk features a compact, rectangular structure with a prominent overhanging flat roof that provides shade and shelter. The main body is constructed from solid, gray panels, likely concrete or composite, with a white trim outlining the upper section. The kiosk sits on a light wood-patterned platform, which may serve as a base or flooring. There are visible cutouts and openings on the front and side, suggesting service windows or counters, and a partial partition inside hints at a functional interior layout. The design is minimalistic and utilitarian, with no visible decorative elements or signage. The overall appearance is robust and suitable for urban environments such as sidewalks, plazas, or parks.
description: A compact, gray kiosk with a flat overhanging roof, white trim, and service openings, set on a light wood-patterned base. Its minimalistic, robust design is ideal for urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main service opening and the overhanging roof, with a partial interior partition visible.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated, this view reveals a side opening and more of the interior partition, as well as the depth of the roof overhang.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the solid back panel and the full extent of the roof, with minimal openings visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the side opening and the interior partition from a different angle, emphasizing the kiosk's depth.
attribute_window_presence: One service window at the front, rectangular
attribute_door_configuration: One open entryway at the rear
attribute_roof_design: Flat overhanging roof, likely composite or concrete, with significant overhang on all sides
